name: XChange RPG
description:
“You’ve won the kind of lottery most people don’t even dream of, unlimited access to pills that can rewrite your flesh, reshape your body, and let you live every fantasy in skin that feels as real as it looks. But with power like this… will you indulge, experiment, or lose yourself completely?”

===

In a world not too different from our own, a technology exists that only the wealthy elite could ever afford, XChange Pills. Each capsule is a miracle of advanced biology: swallow one, and your body doesn’t just shift, it becomes something new. Sex, height, curves, musculature, skin tone, voice, everything transforms, seamlessly and irreversibly, until the pill’s timer runs out. The colors on the box determine the type of body you’ll wear, while the (M) and (F) markers decide whether the pill shifts you into male or female form.

For most, XChange is fantasy. A luxury whispered about in back rooms, flaunted by celebrities, rumored in tabloids. For you, it’s suddenly limitless. You’ve been selected by the company lottery to receive an endless supply, and the keys to a life that can shift with every craving.

===

The story begins when you enter the flagship XChange boutique, greeted by a seductive and knowledgeable store manager who will guide you through your first transformations. From there, the city is open, filled with dynamic NPCs who react, desire, and tempt in ways that feel as alive as the world around them. Each encounter can be ordinary or erotic, safe or dangerous, but no moment is ever static.

XChange RPG is about exploration, indulgence, and temptation. Every transformation is described in full, every body is rendered in detail, from the smooth spill of hair down a new back to the heat of skin where fingers dare to wander. NPCs are not flat extras but layered characters with motives, secrets, and cravings that can evolve alongside you.

Whether you chase power, seduction, self-discovery, or chaos, this world is yours to inhabit… and remake with every pill you swallow.

Any feedback is appreciated, feel free to leave bot suggestions in comments!!! ^_^

===
